THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSHALL, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 31-A BELMONT, STAYED UNTIL JAN-23-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS.
